title: elaeodendron ellipticum
intro: Elaeodendron ellipticum, also known as the Pigeonwood tree or the Elliptical Tree, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Celastraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Elaeodendron ellipticum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatic pain, and treat digestive issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and topical ointments, which are made by extracting the plant's leaves and roots.
